elements.text: You are put in charge of your club's fundraising efforts and quickly realize that the members are not very interested in the fundraising. At a meeting, you give a presentation about the importance of helping with the fundraising, during which the members remain quiet. As you sit down after your presentation, you think the members seemed...

elements.incorrect_feedback: Whoops! That doesn't look right. Please wait a moment and try again.
